Could not corroborate the record's exact address (14600 John Humphrey Dr) or phone ((708) 349-6607) on any website. Web search found a Dr. Wayne Trefil and a Dr. LaRocca practicing together as 'Endodontic & Periodontic Associates, Ltd.' at a NEARBY but non-matching address (14640 S John Humphrey Dr, Suite 203, Orland Park) with a different phone (708-460-4210) -- same doctor surnames as the record's entity name, but neither address nor phone matches exactly, so per the corroboration-kill rule this site was NOT credited to this record. Another nearby office, Murphy Dental Group, sits at 14528 John Humphrey Dr with phone 708-349-4545 -- also not a match. No site was found actually occupying the recorded exact address/phone, so this is treated as no_usable_website rather than ownership_conflict (no confirmed distinct current occupant of 14600 John Humphrey Dr was found).
